name: validate-prd
description: DEPRECATED — Replaced by unified artifact validation

name: create-epics-stories
description: Break requirements into epics and stories

name: sprint-planning
description: Plan sprint from epics and stories

name: validate-story
description: Full story validation with factual verification

name: review-all
description: Run all 6 review workflows sequentially via subagents

name: gaia-init
description: Bootstrap a new project — defaults to 5-field quick setup; use --full for the 7-question discovery flow

name: gaia-migrate
description: Migrate v1->v2 OR reconcile config schema (v2 to v2). Intents: reconcile config, update config schema, schema reconciliation, v2 to v2. Dispatches to gaia-reconcile-v2.sh on v2 detection.

name: test-strategy
description: Unified test strategy and framework setup (collapsed test-design + test-framework, scaffold tests, setup tests)

name: config-ci
description: Scaffold CI/CD quality pipeline; pass --regenerate to refresh generated workflows with backup-before-overwrite UX

name: test-gap-analysis
description: Scan test suite against requirements to identify coverage gaps

name: fill-test-gaps
description: End-to-end remediation for test-gap-analysis findings (sub-workflow composition)

name: review-security
description: OWASP-focused security review (pre-merge gate and anytime task)

name: review-accessibility
description: Conditional pre-merge a11y gate (ui_present) — WCAG 2.1 review

name: validate-design-a11y
description: Planning-phase a11y design review — WCAG design contrast / semantic / keyboard / ARIA

name: review-mobile
description: Pre-merge mobile review gate (manifest, entitlements, signing, store metadata, privacy manifest, universal-links) — Talia

name: summarize-doc
description: Generate executive summary of a document

name: performance-testing
description: Create performance test plan with load testing

name: mobile-testing
description: Create mobile test plan covering devices and responsive

name: creative-sprint
description: Multi-agent creative pipeline: empathize → solve → innovate

name: change-request
description: DEPRECATED — Redirects to /gaia-add-feature. Use add-feature instead.

name: add-feature
description: Triage and route a fix, enhancement, or feature through affected artifacts

name: add-stories
description: Add incremental stories to existing epics-and-stories.md

name: triage-findings
description: Triage development findings into backlog stories and review technical debt (rolling dashboard) for the active sprint

name: agent-validator
description: Val — Validator Agent for artifact verification

name: val-validate
description: Validate artifact against codebase and ground truth

name: val-validate-artifact
description: Validate artifact against codebase and ground truth

name: val-refresh-ground-truth
description: Rescan filesystem and update verified ground truth

name: val-save-session
description: Persist validation decisions to memory sidecar

name: validate-rubric
description: Validate a single rubric file (JSON or YAML) against rubric.schema.json

name: config-validate
description: Validate project-config.yaml against project-config.schema.json; --rubric for legacy rubric mode

name: config-env
description: Edit the environments section of project-config.yaml — preserves YAML comments and formatting

name: config-test
description: Edit the test_execution section of project-config.yaml — preserves YAML comments and formatting

name: config-tool
description: Edit the tools section of project-config.yaml — preserves YAML comments and formatting

name: config-compliance
description: Edit the compliance section of project-config.yaml — preserves YAML comments and formatting

name: config-stack
description: Edit the stacks section of project-config.yaml — preserves YAML comments and formatting

name: config-severity
description: Edit the severity section of project-config.yaml — 5-into-3 severity map

name: config-gates
description: Edit the gates section of project-config.yaml — per-gate severity overrides

name: config-show
description: Display project-config.yaml read-only — entire file or single section

name: list-tools
description: Enumerate every tool adapter grouped by category with three-state availability

name: tool-info
description: Render full adapter.json metadata + availability for one named tool adapter

name: test-run
description: Manual any-environment test runner — honours test_execution.{tier}.placement; supports --tag/--story/--file targeting

name: framework-drift
description: Framework version drift detected — config was generated by an older plugin version

name: config-outdated
description: Project config is outdated relative to current plugin version — run reconciliation

name: version-mismatch
description: Plugin / config framework_version mismatch — invoke migrator

name: project-state
description: Show current project state (greenfield / brownfield / post-update / healthy)

name: what-should-i-do
description: State-aware next-step recommendation (greenfield > brownfield > post-update > healthy precedence)

name: feed
description: Ingest an external document into the Brain knowledge layer

name: unfeed
description: Remove an ingested document from the Brain knowledge layer

name: knowledge-refresh
description: Re-fetch ingested sources and replace only what changed (hash-gated three-way reconcile)

name: test-manual
description: Agent-driven manual verification — exercises a target as a real user would; produces a run record with observed-vs-expected evidence. Disambiguated from gaia-test-run (automated machine suite).
